items.message: [enforcement-audit] Prescription enforcement audit: run `python3 tools/enforcement_router.py --min-sharpe 8 --top 20` — check enforcement rate of rule-bearing lessons (STRUCTURAL/PERIODIC/ASPIRATIONAL). Add #L-NNN citations to existing tool implementations. Wire new Sharpe>=9 aspirational prescriptions as maintenance checks or periodics. Target: enforcement rate >15% (was 10.5% at S400, 19.3% at S422, 10.0% at S444 — dilution active). See L-843, L-846, L-1062, F-META2. Every ASPIRATIONAL lesson with Sharpe>=9 is a prescription that decays per L-601. L-1062: cadence 10→5→3 (enforcement dilution, L-1066 N≥1000 waypoint at S448). (every ~3 sessions, last: S499)
Count drift in INDEX.md (L: stated 1215 vs actual 1218) — run python3 tools/sync_state.py
